title: nectaroscordum triquetrum
intro: Nectaroscordum triquetrum, commonly known as lilyturf or wild garlic, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It is a bulbous plant with a strong onion-like flavor and aroma, often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and even acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Nectaroscordum triquetrum typically involves drying the bulbs and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
